message:
fix: add state.json to required gitignore patterns for crew workspaces

Crew workspaces start with dirty git status because state.json (crew
worker metadata) is not gitignored. Add it to EnsureGitignorePatterns().

Cherry-picked from PR #2461. Fixes #2326.

Co-authored-by: Chris Deal <DreadPirateRobertz@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
